recommendations.title: Child's Pose
recommendations.overview: Child's Pose is a contemporary drama focusing on the relationship between a mother and her 32-year-old son. After the accidental killing of a boy in a car crash, the mother tries to prevent her son being charged for the death, and she refuses to acce

recommendations.title: Downhill
recommendations.overview: Barely escaping an avalanche during a family ski vacation in the Alps, a married couple is thrown into disarray as they are forced to reevaluate their lives and how they feel about each other.

recommendations.title: The Prince of Tides
recommendations.overview: A troubled Southern man talks to his suicidal sister's psychiatrist about their family history and falls in love with her (and New York City) in the process.

recommendations.title: God Willing
recommendations.overview: The son of an atheist, authoritarian father, believed to be liberal, wants to become a priest.

recommendations.title: The Bélier Family

recommendations.title: Another Day of Life

recommendations.director: Raúl de la Fuente, Damian Nenow

recommendations.title: Un Natale al Sud

recommendations.title: Play It Again, Sam
recommendations.overview: A neurotic film critic obsessed with the movie Casablanca attempts to get over his wife leaving him by dating again with the help of a married couple and his illusory idol, Humphrey Bogart.
